title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Grofers Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Grofers Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Grofers Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About Grofers Advisory Limited:
Grofers Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Advisory Limited!
